## Summary
- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Related Issues
- Closes #
- Related #

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows strategy (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, `docs/*`, ...)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if needed)
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)

## Review Focus
Please prioritize:
- Correctness and regressions
- Security/privacy impact
- Performance impact
- Maintainability

## Review Comment Format (Team Rule)
Use tags in review comments:
- `[MUST]` blocking issue that must be fixed before merge
- `[SHOULD]` non-blocking improvement strongly recommended
- `[NIT]` minor suggestion
